title: Design philosophy
sub: The limitations are features. They keep the focus on what's essential.
transparent-desc: No hidden layers, no black boxes. Every abstraction is readable and modifiable. You own the code — not a dependency.
explicit-desc: No decorators, no DI container, no automated change detection. Everything is wired by hand, in plain sight.
scale-desc: Designed for small projects where full frameworks feel heavy. The constraints are intentional, not accidental.
